name: Property Over File Name

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Remove backlinks integration and add a Hide unresolved links toggle

Backlinks were unreliable to override and effectively unfixable, so the
integration is removed entirely. BacklinkService and all of its wiring,
settings, and styles are gone, leaving the rest of the plugin untouched.

New setting: Hide unresolved links. When enabled, the quick switcher and
link suggester only surface notes that already exist, hiding unresolved
link placeholders such as site-absolute paths like /blog/... that have no
matching note in the vault.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-property-over-file-name/compare/0.7.9...0.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.7.7.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-property-over-file-name/compare/0.7.6...0.7.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drive window title from events instead of the workspace.updateTitle hook

The previous implementation only worked when Obsidian exposed
`workspace.updateTitle` as a method we could monkey-patch. That symbol
is undocumented and not in the public type definitions; on the
Obsidian versions where it isn't there, `enable()` silently skipped
everything, our handlers all gated on `this.enabled`, and the OS title
fell through to Obsidian's own filename-based logic for every file.

Rewrite the service to stop depending on the override:

- `applyTitle()` writes directly to `workspace.rootSplit.doc.title`
  from each event handler. It also schedules a single deferred re-write
  (80ms, debounced) so if Obsidian's own internal title code runs
  synchronously *after* our handler returns on the same tick, we
  overwrite it back to the property value on the next tick.
- The legacy `workspace.updateTitle` override is still installed when
  the symbol exists — defense in depth — but is no longer required.
- Listen to a broader set of events that should refresh the title:
  `file-open`, `active-leaf-change`, `metadataCache.changed` (filtered
  to the active file path), `metadataCache.resolved`, `layout-change`,
  and `vault.rename` / `vault.delete` (to keep the per-file memo
  honest).
- `enable()` and `registerEvents()` are idempotent; the per-file
  `lastKnownTitles` memo is preserved from the previous fix so a
  transient cache miss can't downgrade a correct title.
- `onunload` clears the deferred timer and the memo.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-property-over-file-name/compare/0.7.5...0.7.6

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed quick switcher behavior to more closely match vanilla Obsidian's quick switcher.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Excluded Files Support & Customization

- **Flexible Behavior Settings**: Added dropdowns for both the **Quick Switcher** and **Link Suggester** with three modes:
    - **Deemphasize** (Default): Moves excluded files to the bottom and grays them out.
    - **Hide entirely**: Completely removes excluded files from all search results.
    - **Ignore**: Treats them as normal files, bypassing Obsidian's exclusion rules.
- **Smart Initial View**: Even in "Deemphasize" mode, excluded files are now hidden when the search box is empty. This keeps folders like `#tags/` out of your "recent files" list unless you explicitly search for them.
- **Robust Detection**: Implemented a multi-stage check that uses both Obsidian's internal APIs and a manual fallback to `userIgnoreFilters`, ensuring consistent behavior across all vault structures.
- **Stability Fix**: Resolved an issue where direct access to experimental Obsidian APIs was causing the Quick Switcher to crash.

releases.description: Improved MDX compat.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add MDX file support with partial feature coverage

- Add toggle setting for MDX file support in settings UI
- Create frontmatter utilities for reading MDX frontmatter manually
- Add frontmatter cache for synchronous access to async MDX data
- Update all services (tabs, backlinks, explorer, window frame, graph view) to support MDX files
- Fix drag and drop for MDX files with separate sync/async logic paths
- Use synchronous logic for .md files (fast, immediate) and async retry logic for .mdx files
- Update link suggester and quick switcher to handle MDX files
- Add note in settings that MDX support is partial (graph view not fully supported)

releases.description: Fixed issue with dimmed tab titles.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed bug for opening new windows where tabs would be blank indstead of displaying a title.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix: Mark all tabs as processed to prevent hiding non-markdown tabs

Previously, only markdown document tabs were marked as processed, causing tabs from other plugins (GridExplorer, HomeTab, Yearly Glance) to be hidden by CSS. Now all tabs are marked as processed immediately, ensuring visibility while only renaming markdown tabs with property values.

- Query all tab headers from DOM to catch all tab types
- Mark tabs from known view types as processed
- Improve empty text handling and fallback logic

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix tab titles disappearing when disabled and explorer service crash

- Tab titles now remain visible when 'In tab titles' feature is disabled by ensuring tabs are always marked as processed, even when feature is off
- Add null check for view.fileItems in ExplorerService to prevent TypeError when fileItems is undefined/null

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Added a fallback check using the Obsidian workspace API to prevent issues with dragging and dropping file resolution.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Tried to make the drag and drop feature more stable and consistent.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Add property-based titles for backlinks, explorer, tabs, and window frame

- Add BacklinkService for embedded backlinks, backlinks panel, and outgoing links
- Add ExplorerService for file explorer with folder note support
- Add TabService for tab title renaming
- Add WindowFrameService for browser window title bar
- Add settings toggles for all new features
- Add CSS to prevent flicker during title updates

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix display and link insertion for notes without property

- Only show icons/duplicate names for notes with the property
- Show alias as main text with icon when note without property matches via alias
- Only insert display text in links when property exists (prevents displaying duplicate file names)
- Add matchedAliasText tracking to SearchMatchReason type

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add graph view support and switch license to GPLv3

- Add GraphViewService to display property values in graph view nodes
- Add "In graph view" setting (enabled by default)

- Add attribution to Node Masquerade plugin in code and README

Thanks ElsaTam :)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Removed unnecessary type assertions
- Line 152: Changed as TFile[] to a type guard: (file): file is TFile => file instanceof TFile
- Line 183: Same change

### Replaced all any types with proper types

**In QuickSwitchModal.ts:**
- Line 202: Changed (this.app as any).internalPlugins to (this.app as unknown as AppInternal).internalPlugins
- Line 398: Replaced as any with a typed UnresolvedLinkItem object
- Line 415: Replaced (r.item as any).isNewNote with a type guard: 'isNewNote' in r.item && r.item.isNewNote === true
- Lines 463-464: Replaced (item as any).isUnresolved and (item as any).unresolvedText with type guards
- Lines 750-751: Same fix for unresolved link handling

**In LinkTitleSuggest.ts:**
- Line 478: Changed (this.app as any).internalPlugins to (this.app as unknown as AppInternal).internalPlugins

### Added proper type definitions
- Created UnresolvedLinkItem and NewNoteItem interfaces
- Updated QuickSwitchItem to use a union type QuickSwitchItemType
- Extended AppInternal to include internalPlugins with proper typing

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Version 0.4.8

**Search Compatibility with Vanilla Obsidian**
- Replaced custom fuzzy matching with Obsidian's native `prepareFuzzySearch` and `prepareSimpleSearch` APIs
- Now uses Obsidian's `sortSearchResults()` for native sorting behavior
- Implemented proper fallback downranking: title matches get full score, file name/alias matches get -1 penalty
- Added `useSimpleSearch` setting for better performance in large vaults
- Removed custom scoring logic in favor of Obsidian's native implementation

**Quick Switcher Enhancements**
- Now respects quick switcher core plugin settings (attachments, file types)
- Limited initial display to 8 items for better modal visibility
- Shows file-plus icon for unresolved links (instead of "Enter to create" text)
- Filters unresolved links when "Show existing only" setting is enabled
- Properly backfills recent files list when attachments are disabled
- New notes created from Quick Switcher now respect Obsidian's default new note location settings

**Link Suggester Improvements**
- Removed "create new note" option to match vanilla Obsidian behavior
- Shows "No match found" message when no suggestions are available
- Respects "Show existing only" setting for unresolved links
- Better alignment with default Obsidian link suggestion behavior

### Technical Changes
- Improved quick switcher command override reliability
- Enhanced file filtering based on quick switcher settings
- Better handling of unresolved links from metadata cache
- Use `workspace.openLinkText()` for new note creation to respect user settings

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
fix: resolve TypeScript linting issues and improve type safety

- Replace all `any` types with proper `PropertyOverFileNamePlugin` interface
- Fix type assertions using proper interface types (`VaultInternal`, `WorkspaceInternal`)
- Replace innerHTML with DOM API methods for SVG creation (security)
- Fix async/await: remove async from `selectSuggestion`, add void operator to promise
- Replace deprecated `splitActiveLeaf` with `getLeaf(true)`
- Remove unused imports (Platform, QuickSwitchModal) and variables
- Fix metadataCache type from `any` to `MetadataCache`
- Bump version to 0.4.6

releases.description: Fixed major bug with globally changing CSS styles when enabled, fixed and improved quick switcher and link suggestor to be more similar to default behavior.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## Major Fixes
- **Fixed broken link suggestor** - Restored property-based title suggestions when typing `[[` in the editor
- **Restored proper suggester priority** - Link suggestor now correctly overrides default Obsidian LinkSuggest

## Enhanced Visual Experience
- **Added visual icons to link suggestor** - Now matches quick switcher with type icon for custom properties and arrow icon for aliases
- **Improved quick switcher UI** - Enhanced styling and visual feedback
- **Better drag & drop handling** - More reliable file insertion with property-based titles

## Quick Switcher Improvements
- **Recent files display** - Shows 10 most recently opened files when no search query
- **Enhanced search** - Better fuzzy matching and result prioritization
- **Consistent iconography** - Visual indicators for property vs alias vs filename results

## Bug Fixes
- Resolved permanent link suggester registration issues
- Fixed suggester cleanup and re-registration logic
- Improved error handling and cursor positioning

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Changed the regex pattern from looking for links with the full path (e.g., [[posts/filename]]) to looking for links with just the filename (e.g., [[filename]]).
- Support whether it's a relative link, shortest path possible or absolute path in vault.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:

- Fixed issue where linking notes only looked in select directories instead of the whole vault.
